title: selaginella lyallii
intro: Selaginella lyallii, also known as the mountain tassel fern or rock fern, is a species of evergreen fern native to New Zealand, characterized by its small, scale-like fronds and ability to grow in rocky, shaded areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella lyallii include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting the body's natural detoxification processes. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
